company.name: Helios AI
company.description: Helios AI is the observability and evaluation platform for teams shipping LLM applications. We trace every prompt, score output quality in real time, and catch regressions before they reach production. 240 engineering teams run Helios in their CI and live traffic.

pitch_claims.unique_selling_point: The only LLM observability suite with automated eval scoring wired directly into CI — regressions are blocked before merge.

customer_revenue_breakdown.note: Healthy diversification — no single customer exceeds 14% of ARR.

unit_economics.note: LTV:CAC of 7.1x is well above the Series A benchmark of 3x. Payback under 9 months.

legal.ip_status: 3 utility patents granted on automated eval scoring; all core IP assigned to the company with clean invention-assignment agreements.

litigation.value: No active lawsuits, IP disputes, or pending claims. Clean legal standing.
litigation.evidence: Legal diligence questionnaire and outside counsel confirmation

regulatory_compliance.soc2: SOC 2 Type II certified (audited by Prescient Assurance, report dated 2026-03).
regulatory_compliance.gdpr: Fully GDPR compliant; EU data residency available; DPA in place with all enterprise customers.
regulatory_compliance.licensing: Developer tooling — no money-transmitter or sector licensing required. Fully compliant.
regulatory_compliance.data_privacy: Customer prompt data is tenant-isolated and encrypted; zero-retention mode available.

cap_table.note: Clean cap table. Standard preferred terms, 1x non-participating, no unusual ratchets.

tech_stack.infrastructure: Kubernetes on AWS EKS, multi-AZ, infrastructure-as-code via Terraform

security.last_penetration_test: Annual third-party penetration test completed 2026-02 by NCC Group — no critical or high findings open.
security.pii_storage: All customer data encrypted at rest with AES-256; secrets in AWS KMS.
security.mfa: SSO/SAML and MFA enforced for all admin and customer accounts.
security.incident_history: No security breaches or data-exposure events to date.

architecture.scalability: Sustains 3.2B traced events/day; load-tested to 5x current peak with autoscaling.
architecture.tech_debt_assessment: LOW — strong test coverage (84%), documented services, no contractor-orphaned code.

actual_market_trends.ai_tooling_yoy_growth: AI developer-tooling spend grew 61% in 2025 as enterprises moved LLM apps to production.
actual_market_trends.vc_funding: Investment into AI infrastructure and tooling rose sharply in 2025.
actual_market_trends.adoption: 78% of enterprises now run at least one LLM application in production (up from 41% the prior year).
actual_market_trends.tailwinds: Production LLM adoption is driving durable demand for evaluation and observability.

market.positioning: Helios is the only entrant with eval scoring wired into CI; incumbents focus on dashboards, not pre-merge gating.

ceo.name: Priya Nadkarni
ceo.previous_company: Staff Engineer at Datadog (5 years), led tracing platform
ceo.assessment: Deep observability domain expertise; built the category she is now selling into.

cto.name: Daniel Reyes
cto.assessment: Strong distributed-systems pedigree; architected the high-throughput ingestion pipeline.

team_gaps: VP Sales hired Q1 2026 — go-to-market motion still ramping, but pipeline coverage is 3.1x.

deal_summary.existing_investor_participation: Amplify Partners exercising full pro-rata; Seed investors over-subscribed.
